Varga chathushtaya
method to verify whether it is correct or not.
Sunrise Time: 6.01 AM (Tip of the sun truly on the eastern
horizon) Sunset Time : 6.31 PM (Previous day)
Day Time Duration (Night): 6.01 (+12.00)- 6.31 = 11.30
Hours Yama Duration: 11.30/8 = 86 min= 126 hours
7th Yama = 4.33 to 5.59 AM
It is an Odd Y ama and therefore counting in the order Earth,
Water, Fire, Air, Sky. Duration for Earth Tatva = (30/90)x86
= 2814011
Duration for Water Tatva = (24/90)x86 = 22' 5611
Duration for Fire Tatva = (18/90)x86 = 17' 1211
Duration for Air Tatva = (12/90)x86 = 11' 2811
Duration for Sky Tatva = (6/90)x86 = 5' 4411

94 Secrets o( Birth Time Rectification
Earlier we have already concluded that the BT window is
from 4.47 AM to 5.30 AM. Let us calculate-
04 33 00 (7th Yama starts)+
28 40 (Earth Tatva rise)
05 01 40 +
22 56 (Water Ta~va rise)
05 24 36 +
17 12 (Fire Tatvarise)
05 41 48
Rise of Air Tatva or Antara is a must for the birth to take
place. That means we got 3 choices.
